nodes.name: Webhook Trigger
nodes.comment: Accepts JSON: { message, model (optional), temperature (optional), max_tokens (optional), channel (optional) }. API key via X-API-Key header only.

nodes.name: Validate Input
nodes.comment: Validates: API key auth (header only - X-API-Key), model name, message length, temperature (0.0-2.0), max_tokens (100-4096), channel name

nodes.name: Check Valid
nodes.comment: Branches based on validation result. True branch continues to LocalAI API Call, false branch goes to Error Response.

nodes.name: Discord Output
nodes.comment: Sends response to Discord webhook. Truncates to 1800 chars to stay under Discord's 2000 char limit.

parameters.text:
={{ '*LocalAI Inference Failed* ❌

**Error:** ' + (($input.all()[0]?.error?.message || $input.all()[0]?.error?.description || $json.error || 'Unknown error')).toString().slice(0, 997).trimEnd() + '

Please check:
- LocalAI service is running
- API key is valid (if configured)
- Model name is valid
- Message length is under 32768 chars' }}

nodes.name: Discord Error
nodes.comment: Sends error notification from validation or API call failures.
